## 📝 Description
Provide a concise description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

## 🔗 Related Issue / Module
Target module: (e.g. User Management, Member Management)
Fixes/Closes Issue: #

## 🛠️ Type of Change
Please check the options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring / Architecture update (no structural behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## 🏁 Definition of Done Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please check that you have completed the following:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly locally.
- [ ] MVVM architecture conventions are followed (no UI-to-DB coupling).
- [ ] Input validation is implemented on both Client and Server.
- [ ] Unit/Integration tests have been run and passed.
- [ ] Offline SQLite compatibility has been verified.
- [ ] Core database schemas (MySQL & SQLite) align with specifications.
- [ ] Relevant documentation under `docs/` and `docs/06_Changelog.md` has been updated.

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots or GIFs of the UI changes to help reviewers.
